issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks across the post-referral, pre-referral, and sale pending workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations, which HubSpot identified as a problem with associations and filters. HAs and TCs were receiving multiple copies of the same tasks simultaneously.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks to avoid double-processing.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filter did not correctly suppress task creation for these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was applied to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral check-in tasks received for deals that were already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then moved back to a prior stage (e.g., Committed/Referred Active), and then set to Offer Accepted again, the workflow tasks did not re-trigger the second time. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to fix this.
issues.workaround: For deals that fell through and went back under contract during the impact window, manually enroll them in the Offer Accepted workflow to ensure TC tasks are triggered.

issues.title: Automated emails sending with incorrect loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The agent-facing automated email showed the old LO name rather than the newly assigned LO. The issue was resolved by Luis on the product side.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually send the relevant agent communications with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks after referral accepted on March 18th
issues.desc: A referral accepted on March 18th did not trigger any post-referral workflow tasks for the HA. The root cause was a data-pulling error that prevented the workflow filter from evaluating correctly. The issue was escalated to the product team for resolution.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll affected deals into the post-referral workflow and manually complete or create any tasks that should have been generated since the referral acceptance date.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent in Offer Accepted stage without credit amount populated
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was incorrectly firing in the Offer Accepted deal stage, before closing information had been submitted and the credit amount could be calculated. The SMS should only send in the Sale Pending stage once the credit amount is available. This was confirmed to be a dash-triggered communication rather than a HubSpot workflow issue, and was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: For buyers who received the incomplete credit SMS during the Offer Accepted stage, manually send a follow-up message with the correct credit amount once closing information has been submitted.
